background: There are n workers in an assembly line factory and it is known that the number of workers independently reporting for work on a given day is binomially distributed with parameters n and p where p is the probability of an individual who presents for work.

task.query: What is the probability that there will be at least two absentees on a given day selected at a random?
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: Determine this probability when p = 0.95 and n = 20.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
